'''dhathodho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:obaship|obaship]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-th-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:obaship|obaship]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dhathodho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæthedheth|dhæthedheth]] || [[word:dhæthedhej|dhæthedhej]] || [[word:dhæthedhesh|dhæthedhesh]] || [[word:dhæthedhe|dhæthedhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhathothodhoth|dhathothodhoth]] || [[word:dhathothodhoj|dhathothodhoj]] || [[word:dhathothodhosh|dhathothodhosh]] || [[word:dhathothodho|dhathothodho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhathodhoth|dhathodhoth]] || [[word:dhathodhoj|dhathodhoj]] || [[word:dhathodhosh|dhathodhosh]] || [[word:dhathodho|dhathodho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhathofdhofth|dhathofdhofth]] || [[word:dhathofdhofj|dhathofdhofj]] || [[word:dhathofdhofsh|dhathofdhofsh]] || [[word:dhathofdhof|dhathofdhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhathodhotho|dhathodhotho]] || [[word:dhathodhojo|dhathodhojo]] || [[word:dhathodhosho|dhathodhosho]] || [[word:dhathodhoko|dhathodhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhathodhoth|dhathodhoth]] || [[word:dhathodhoj|dhathodhoj]] || [[word:dhathodhosh|dhathodhosh]] || [[word:dhathodho|dhathodho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhathodhothol|dhathodhothol]] || [[word:dhathodhojol|dhathodhojol]] || [[word:dhathodhoshol|dhathodhoshol]] || [[word:dhathodhokol|dhathodhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhathodhoothotho|dhathodhoothotho]] || [[word:dhathodhoojojo|dhathodhoojojo]] || [[word:dhathodhooshosho|dhathodhooshosho]] || [[word:dhathodhooko|dhathodhooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhathodhothon|dhathodhothon]] || [[word:dhathodhojon|dhathodhojon]] || [[word:dhathodhoshon|dhathodhoshon]] || [[word:dhathodhokon|dhathodhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhathodhothooro|dhathodhothooro]] || [[word:dhathodhojooro|dhathodhojooro]] || [[word:dhathodhoshooro|dhathodhoshooro]] || [[word:dhathodhokooro|dhathodhokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5551a29}}
